canonical_definition: Tibetan adaptation of SafetyBench, a safety evaluation benchmark with 11,435 questions across 7 safety-critical categories including ethics, bias, health, and privacy.
papers: Spectral Scaling Laws in Language Models: emphHow Effectively Do Feed-Forward Networks Use Their Latent Space?
